subject: session date
fact: The session date is January 19th, 2026.
source_quote: Date: Jan 19th, 2026

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass is a yugoloth who has entered into a binding contract with the party.
source_quote: You have entered into a binding contract with the yugoloth Maram il Vass

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass states that Felkur does not know what he stole or why he is being pursued.
source_quote: Maram il Vass discovers that Felkur doesn't even know what he stole and why he is being pursued

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass asks Felkur if he has any idea what he has done.
source_quote: "Do you have any idea, Felkur, what you've done?"

subject: Vraxen
fact: Vraxen is a rival of Maram il Vass.
source_quote: currently held by his rival, Vraxen

subject: Vraxen
fact: Vraxen currently possesses the Lexicon of Oaths.
source_quote: currently under the possession of Vraxen

subject: Vraxen
fact: Vraxen is supposed to be monitoring the situation for Graz'zt.
source_quote: Vraxen is supposed to be monitoring the situation for Graz'zt

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur has learned the truth of his past regarding a stolen item.
source_quote: Felkur has finally learned the truth of his past

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur thought he stole a random trinket.
source_quote: Felkur thought he stole a random trinket

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur accidentally tripped the most sophisticated anti-divination ward in the multiverse.
source_quote: you accidentally tripped the most sophisticated anti-divination ward in the multiverse

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur sold the Watcher's Eye Brooch for forty pieces of silver.
source_quote: "bauble" you sold for forty pieces of silver

subject: Felkur
fact: The Brotherhood of Cloaks believes Felkur is a Level 20 Wizard or a chosen of Mask.
source_quote: must be a Level 20 Wizard or a chosen of Mask

subject: Felkur
fact: The Brotherhood of Cloaks thinks Felkur is the leader of an 'Army'.
source_quote: they're still looking for the 'Army' they assume you must lead

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak is the archwizard and ruler of Szith Morcane.
source_quote: "I am Solom Ned'razak, archwizard and ruler of Szith Morcane

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak reunited with the party at the drow encampment at Sporedome.
source_quote: Upon returning to the drow encampment at Sporedome, you reunited with Solom Ned'razak

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak thanked the party for recovering Xaven Tanor'this.
source_quote: Thank you for recovering Xaven Tanor'this from the palace of Maram il Vass

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak views himself as indispensable to the drow's survival.
source_quote: viewing himself as indispensable to the drow's survival

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak considers the adventurers important but replaceable.
source_quote: considering the adventurers "important but replaceable"

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak refuses to join the party directly.
source_quote: Solom refuses to join the party directly

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak stated that every demon-blooded pest is going to pay for what they did.
source_quote: every demon-blooded pest is going to pay for what they did

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak explained what a portable hole is to Daein.
source_quote: Solom explains what a portable hole is to Daein

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this is a collaborator of Solom Ned'razak.
source_quote: Solom and his collaborator, Xaven Tanor'this

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this was recovered from the palace of Maram il Vass.
source_quote: recovering Xaven Tanor'this from the palace of Maram il Vass

subject: Hledh
fact: Hledh is a giantess who commands heavy guards in Maerimydra.
source_quote: heavy guards commanded by the giantess Hledh

subject: Brotherhood of Cloaks
fact: The Brotherhood of Cloaks has spent thousands of gold pieces on divination rituals.
source_quote: The Brotherhood of Cloaks has spent thousands of gold pieces on divination rituals

subject: Brotherhood of Cloaks
fact: The Brotherhood of Cloaks has executed three High Inquisitors for failing to find Felkur.
source_quote: They've executed three High Inquisitors for 'failing' to find a master infiltrator

subject: demon-powered giants
fact: Demon-powered giants are occupying the city of Maerimydra.
source_quote: demon-powered giants occupying the city

subject: demon-powered giants
fact: The demon-powered giants are probably at each other's throats with Vraxen.
source_quote: Vraxen and the demon powered Giants are probably at each other's throats

subject: Graz'zt
fact: Maerimydra is being supported by Graz'zt.
source_quote: Maerimydra is being supported by Graz'zt

subject: Maerimydra
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths is located in Maerimydra.
source_quote: The book is in Maerimydra

subject: Sporedome
fact: Sporedome is a drow encampment where the party reunited with Solom Ned'razak.
source_quote: drow encampment at Sporedome

subject: Pathway of the Shadows
fact: The Pathway of the Shadows is a secret tunnel known only to Solom and Xaven Tanor'this.
source_quote: secret route known only to Solom and his collaborator, Xaven Tanor'this

subject: Pathway of the Shadows
fact: The Pathway of the Shadows leads directly into the Shattered Tower inside Maerimydra.
source_quote: leads directly into the Shattered Tower (Solom's former center of study) inside Maerimydra

subject: Black Ember Outpost
fact: The Black Ember Outpost is a fire giant stronghold built over a hidden tunnel.
source_quote: Black Ember Outpost, a fire giant stronghold built over a hidden tunnel

subject: Black Ember Outpost
fact: The Black Ember Outpost is located four miles from Maerimydra.
source_quote: four miles from the city

subject: Shattered Tower
fact: The Shattered Tower was Solom's former center of study.
source_quote: Shattered Tower (Solom's former center of study)

subject: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning
fact: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning is a basalt tower with a green-glowing teleportation circle at its apex.
source_quote: basalt tower with a green-glowing teleportation circle at its apex

subject: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning
fact: Felkur intends to recalibrate the teleportation circle in The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning for the party's escape.
source_quote: Felkur intends to recalibrate for your escape

subject: Moonsea
fact: The Brotherhood of Cloaks considers the security of the Moonsea to have been struck by a surgical strike.
source_quote: surgical strike against the security of the Moonsea

subject: Astral Plane
fact: The Brotherhood of Cloaks has scoured the Astral Plane.
source_quote: They've scoured the Astral Plane

subject: Lexicon of Oaths
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths is a tome of great significance.
source_quote: Lexicon of Oaths, a tome of great significance

subject: Lexicon of Oaths
fact: The Lexicon of Oaths is the book the party agreed to secure.
source_quote: They have agreed to secure a book - The Lexicon of Oaths

subject: hourglass
fact: Maram il Vass handed an hourglass to the party.
source_quote: Maram il Vass hands an hourglass to the party

subject: hourglass
fact: The hourglass represents the time the party has left to find the Lexicon of Oaths.
source_quote: represents the time they have left to find the Lexicon of Oaths before they run out of time

subject: Watcher's Eye Brooch
fact: The Watcher's Eye Brooch is a symbol of power that Felkur stole.
source_quote: stole a symbol of power: The Watcher's Eye Brooch

subject: Watcher's Eye Brooch
fact: The Watcher's Eye Brooch allowed its possessor to be undetected.
source_quote: A power of the brooch was to allow it's possessor to be undetected

subject: portable hole
fact: Solom Ned'razak explained the concept of a portable hole.
source_quote: explaining the alphabet of the multiverse to a man who hits things for a living

subject: demons
fact: Solom Ned'razak refers to demons as 'demon-blooded pests'.
source_quote: "demon-blooded pests" supported by Graz'zt

subject: contract signing
fact: The party entered into a binding contract with Maram il Vass.
source_quote: You have entered into a binding contract with the yugoloth Maram il Vass

subject: distraction strategy
fact: Maram il Vass suggests creating a massive distraction by inciting a conflict between Vraxen's administration and the demon-powered giants.
source_quote: Maram suggests creating a massive distraction by inciting a conflict between Vraxen's demonic administration and the demon-powered giants

subject: Felkur's revelation
fact: Felkur learned he stole the Watcher's Eye Brooch instead of a simple trinket.
source_quote: he did not steal a simple trinket, but the Watcher's Eye Brooch

subject: Solom's task
fact: Solom Ned'razak presented a task to the party to purge the demonic taint from the region.
source_quote: Solom requires the blood of a living fire giant that has been infused with fiendish essence

subject: infiltration plan
fact: The party decided to use a secret route known as the Path of Shadows instead of a frontal assault.
source_quote: Instead, you will use a secret route known only to Solom and his collaborator, Xaven Tanor'this

subject: travel to Black Ember Outpost
fact: The party must travel to the Black Ember Outpost to access the tunnel.
source_quote: You must travel to the Black Ember Outpost

subject: recalibrating teleportation
fact: Felkur intends to recalibrate the teleportation circle at the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning.
source_quote: Felkur intends to recalibrate for your escape

subject: time limit
fact: The party has a limited amount of time to secure the Lexicon of Oaths before the window of opportunity closes.
source_quote: exact time remaining to secure the book before your window of opportunity closes

subject: demon blood purge
fact: The party must obtain the blood of a living fire giant infused with fiendish essence to purge the region.
source_quote: Solom requires the blood of a living fire giant that has been infused with fiendish essence

subject: escape plan
fact: The party needs to reach the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning to leave the city.
source_quote: To leave the city, you must reach The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning
